package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for read_then_decode_duplicate_materialization: request data is fully read and then decoded from the same bytes.
type CaseReadThenDecodeDuplicateMaterializationDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveReadThenDecodeDuplicateMaterialization(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseReadThenDecodeDuplicateMaterializationDTO) error {
    payload := io.NopCloser(strings.NewReader(input))
    raw, _ := io.ReadAll(payload)

    var decoded map[string]any
    _ = json.Unmarshal(raw, &decoded)
    c.Set("decoded", decoded)
    return nil
}
